title: Flaky Brazilian Cheese Curds Toast
description: A quick, savory Brazilian dish featuring flaky cheese curds on toasted bread, perfect for a Mediterranean-friendly snack or light meal.

ingredients.name: toasted bread
ingredients.notes: Use sturdy bread like sourdough or whole grain

ingredients.name: brazilian cheese curds
ingredients.notes: Fresh or pre-made cheese curds from Brazilian cheese

ingredients.name: olive oil
ingredients.notes: Extra virgin olive oil for flavor

instructions: Toast 2 slices of bread in a pan until golden and crispy
In a small bowl, mix 100g Brazilian cheese curds with 1 tsp olive oil
Spread the cheese curds mixture evenly over the toasted bread
Top with chopped parsley and serve immediately
